# integrationDelete

Deletes an integration.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`DeletePayload`](../objects/delete_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
